description_long: This is a medium-sized, round orange pumpkin with a slightly glossy surface and a green, curved stem on top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing jack-o'-lantern expression, featuring sharply angled eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth. The carving is deep, exposing the hollow interior and giving the pumpkin a dramatic, expressive look. The sides and back of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying the natural ribbed texture and subtle color variations typical of a real pumpkin. The surface shows some minor blemishes and greenish patches, adding to its realism. The overall appearance suggests it is intended as a festive Halloween decoration, likely to be found in urban outdoor settings.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a green stem, featuring a dramatic jack-o'-lantern face and a glossy, ribbed surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved jack-o'-lantern face with sharp eyes, nose, and jagged mouth.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the facial cutouts and the transition to the uncarved surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, ribbed orange surface and the green stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with mostly uncarved surface and a glimpse of the carved face's edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The pattern is expressive and menacing, typical of Halloween motifs.
